scripts.build:native: cd native/weathr-bridge && npm install --no-package-lock && npm run build
scripts.build:native:debug: cd native/weathr-bridge && npm install --no-package-lock && npm run build:debug
scripts.native:prepare-packages: cd native/weathr-bridge && npm install --no-package-lock && npm run create-npm-dir
scripts.native:sync-artifacts: cd native/weathr-bridge && npm install --no-package-lock && npm run artifacts
scripts.native:publish-packages: cd native/weathr-bridge && for pkg in npm/*; do if ls "$pkg"/*.node >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm publish "./$pkg" --access public --provenance; else echo "Skipping $pkg (no binary)"; fi; done
